ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election 2020) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election was held */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election occurred */,
  "total_precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts involved in the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election associated with the precinct */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifying the precinct */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of absentee votes in the precinct */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of provisional votes in the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the precinct record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the precinct record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_votes" (
  "absentee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee voting record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the absentee votes */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of absentee voting (e.g., mail, in-person) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of absentee votes counted */,
  "outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding absentee ballots */,
  "requested" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots requested */,
  "received" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots received */,
  "rejected" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots rejected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the absentee voting record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the absentee voting record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provisional_votes" (
  "provisional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisional voting record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the provisional votes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the provisional ballot (e.g., pending, verified) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total number of provisional ballots counted */,
  "outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding provisional ballots */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Number of provisional ballots verified */,
  "rejected" INTEGER /* Number of provisional ballots rejected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provisional voting record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provisional voting record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provisional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with the votes */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party of the candidate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the turnout */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout in the precinct */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the turnout record */,
  "voters_registered" INTEGER /* Number of voters registered in the precinct */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast in the precinct */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the turnout record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the turnout record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, official) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the log record */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's access to the EDMS */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, data_export) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election associated with the official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election official record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election official record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct associated with the demographic record */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters (e.g., 18-24, 25-34, 35-44) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters (e.g., male, female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voters (e.g., white, black, hispanic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)
